ideas.idea_title: Conical Burr Coffee Grinder Adjustment Collar
ideas.product_context: Manual or electric burr coffee grinder used for espresso-to-French-press grind adjustment.
ideas.core_function: Holds and indexes the upper conical burr while allowing fine axial position changes.
ideas.likely_main_part: Threaded stepped adjustment collar with detent pockets and burr mounting lands.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines internal threads, concentric stepped bores, radial detent features, tight coaxial references, and small repeated pockets around a circular body.

ideas.product_context: Countertop meat grinder or mixer attachment for sausage and ground meat preparation.
ideas.core_function: Draws meat from the hopper and compresses it toward the cutting knife and extrusion plate.
ideas.likely_main_part: Tapered helical auger screw with drive coupling and front knife pilot.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires continuous helical flights, changing pitch or diameter, blended root fillets, keyed drive geometry, and a functional transition from screw body to shaft.

ideas.product_context: Lever or motorized citrus juicer for oranges, lemons, and grapefruit.
ideas.core_function: Ruptures citrus segments while guiding juice downward and retaining pulp.
ideas.likely_main_part: Ribbed tapered reamer cone with central hub and drainage channels.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests radial rib repetition on a curved tapered surface, alternating grooves, smooth lofted cone geometry, and blended drain paths.

ideas.product_context: Kitchen stand mixer head that drives beaters in a planetary mixing motion.
ideas.core_function: Supports rotating gear elements so the beater shaft orbits while spinning.
ideas.likely_main_part: Planet carrier hub with offset shaft bosses, bearing seats, and gear clearance pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Includes eccentric axes, precise bearing bores, multiple concentric and nonconcentric features, gear relief cutouts, and load-bearing filleted bosses.

ideas.product_context: Hand-cranked or motorized pasta roller used to progressively thin dough sheets.
ideas.core_function: Shifts roller spacing through indexed thickness settings.
ideas.likely_main_part: Multi-lobed eccentric cam disk with selector notches and shaft bore.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests noncircular cam profiles, angular indexing, asymmetric lobes, shaft flats, and dimensionally meaningful offset geometry.

ideas.product_context: Adjustable mandoline slicer for vegetables such as potatoes, cucumbers, and carrots.
ideas.core_function: Raises or lowers the food deck relative to the blade to set slice thickness.
ideas.likely_main_part: Sliding ramp carriage with angled guide rails, blade clearance slot, and locking teeth.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines angled reference planes, long slots, rack-like teeth, shallow ramps, and clearance geometry tied to a cutting edge.

ideas.product_context: Small bakery dough sheeter or countertop laminator for pastry dough.
ideas.core_function: Supports a heavy roller while transmitting torque and maintaining alignment.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped roller end journal with bearing seats, keyway, retaining groove, and taper transition.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests precision stepped shafts, grooves, keyways, chamfers, bearing shoulders, and transitions between cylindrical sections with different tolerance roles.

ideas.idea_title: Food Processor Bowl Bayonet Lock Ring
ideas.product_context: Food processor bowl interface that twists onto the motor base before operation.
ideas.core_function: Locks the bowl mechanically and aligns safety interlock features.
ideas.likely_main_part: Circular bayonet lock ring with ramped lugs, stop blocks, and interlock actuator tab.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires circumferential locking ramps, interrupted ring geometry, repeated but directional lugs, undercut-like stops, and functional angular travel constraints.

ideas.product_context: Home grain mill or oat flaker feeding kernels into crushing or milling rollers.
ideas.core_function: Grips and meters grain into the milling gap.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical feed roller with axial flutes, knurled grip zones, and keyed shaft ends.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests repeated flutes around a cylinder, shallow concave groove profiles, shaft-to-roller transitions, rotational symmetry, and manufacturable texture-like geometry.

ideas.product_context: Handheld rotary grater for hard cheese, chocolate, or nuts.
ideas.core_function: Cuts food against a fixed pressure plate as the drum rotates.
ideas.likely_main_part: Perforated cylindrical grater drum with raised cutting lips and end drive socket.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges CAD representation with patterned holes on a curved surface, directional cutting protrusions, thin-wall cylinder constraints, rolled-edge rims, and a nonround drive interface.
